title: Public Health Analyst
description: Eli Lilly is a global pharmaceutical leader with 150+ years of commitment to developing medicines and advancing public health. You'll analyze public health data informing global health initiatives.
responsibilities: Analyze epidemiological data on disease prevalence and trends
Support public health surveillance and reporting
Evaluate intervention programs and health outcomes
Develop data visualizations for public health stakeholders
Research best practices and evidence-based approaches
Contribute to public health publications and presentations

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Public Health, Epidemiology, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years of public health research or analysis experience

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
Employee assistance program (EAP) with mental health services
